All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

R

radius - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
radiusAt(double, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
Same radius formula, but looked up by X position -- used to glue details to the real hull surface.
radiusAtIndex(int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
The hull's radius at a given "printed slice" index: a downward parabola over t in [0, 1] (bow to stern), narrow at both ends and widest at the middle -- the torpedo shape.
random - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
 
random - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.RandomShootingStrategy
 
randomOrigin(Random) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.FleetPlacer
 
RandomShootingStrategy - Class in com.example.battleship.model.player
Picks a uniformly random cell, among the ones not shot at yet, on every call -- the machine-player behavior required by HU-4.
RandomShootingStrategy() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.RandomShootingStrategy
Uses a new, non-seeded Random.
RandomShootingStrategy(Random) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.RandomShootingStrategy
 
readObject(ObjectInputStream) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Restores the transient Board.listeners list after deserialization -- it is never part of the saved state, so it is always recreated empty; the controller re-attaches itself after loading.
rebuildBoardView(Board, Group, boolean) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Builds the 3D shape for every ship on an already-placed board and adds it to the scene, then replays every shot already resolved on that board -- a miss becomes an X mark, a hit or sunk cell is applied to the matching ship via Ship3D.markHit(int).
rebuildPreview() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
Rebuilds the preview ghost at ShipPlacementController.previewRow/ShipPlacementController.previewColumn for the current ship type and orientation.
receiveShot(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Resolves a shot at the given position: marks the cell, updates the hit ship (if any), and notifies listeners.
refreshContinueButtonState() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
Enables/disables "Continuar" (and updates its tooltip) to match whether a saved game currently exists on disk.
registerHit(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
Marks the segment at position as hit.
remainingTypes - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
removeListener(CombatListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
removeListener(ShipPlacementListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
removeListener(BoardListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
removePreviewNode() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
Removes the current preview ghost node from the scene, if one is showing.
renderTextTexture(String) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
Renders a single character/word to a small transparent-background image.
replayHit(Cell, Map<Ship, Ship3D>, Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Applies a single already-recorded hit/sunk cell to the 3D shape of whichever ship occupies it, via Ship3D.markHit(int).
replayShotMarks(Board, Map<Ship, Ship3D>, Group) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Walks every cell of board and re-applies whatever shot outcome it already recorded (miss, hit, or sunk) to the matching 3D shapes.
requireTurn(Turn) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
Guards a shot-firing method against being called out of turn.
resolveNextMachineShot() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Resolves exactly one machine shot -- always called back on the JavaFX Application Thread, never directly from CombatController.scheduleNextMachineShot()'s background thread.
result - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.model.Game.ShotOutcome
The field for the result record component.
result() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.model.Game.ShotOutcome
Returns the value of the result record component.
resume() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
Jumps straight into combat with an already-placed, already in-progress game (HU-5).
resumeIfMachinesTurn() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Kicks off the machine's turn if the game is currently in the middle of it.
reverseLetterOrder - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
The field for the reverseLetterOrder record component.
reverseLetterOrder() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
Returns the value of the reverseLetterOrder record component.
reverseNumberOrder - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
The field for the reverseNumberOrder record component.
reverseNumberOrder() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
Returns the value of the reverseNumberOrder record component.
root3D - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
 
rootStack - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
rotateKeyHandler - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
RotateKeyHandler() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController.RotateKeyHandler
 
rotationY - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
The field for the rotationY record component.
rotationY() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
Returns the value of the rotationY record component.
row - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
The field for the row record component.
row - Variable in exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.OutOfBoardException
 
row - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.Water3D
 
row() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
Returns the value of the row record component.
ROWS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Number of rows on the board.
